title: BlockCarpentry: Modernized
description:
A modern port of BlockCarpentry, a mod that adds coverable blocks! Inspired by the 1.7.10 mod, "Carpenter's Blocks". 

Now for 1.20.1!
body:
# BlockCarpentry: Modernized
A modern port of [BlockCarpentry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockcarpentry), a mod that adds coverable blocks! Inspired by the 1.7.10 mod, "Carpenter's Blocks".

Have you ever wanted to make a door out of dirt, or vertical slabs made out of sponges or a slope made out of [insert random block here] to spice up your builds? Then this mod is for you!

![A Minecraft screenshot containing a few of the mod's blocks in their bare form.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b0294b49a264d7334a58295876df9915804572d.png)

![A Minecraft screenshot containing a few of the mod's blocks in their canvas form.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1990dbc5060263bcbc90ccfc64d9cf5245e5f0a.png)

The primary goal of this fork is to keep up with the changing Minecraft and modloader APIs in order for it to be playable on future versions.

## Bug Reports
Please report any bug to **this** [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/matteodev8/BlockCarpentry-Modernized/issues)

The port was done very quickly, so the current state isn't perfect but it works.

## Credits

99.9% of the work was done by the original mod author, [PianoManu](https://github.com/PianoManu).
